data.body:
Decision log (Clusters D/E/F) — env-var sweep COMPLETE:
CLUSTER D (Jira): JIRA_API_TOKEN=KEEP (secret, env/.env); JIRA_URL/USER/PROJECT=KEEP + config jira.url/user/project (Atlassian-ecosystem JIRA_ names retained; 4 form one credential bundle, matches b5db onboarding).
CLUSTER E (reconciler tunables — advanced, rarely-needed; sensible defaults kept; RENAME for clarity + config-ify under reconciler.*):
  REBAR_ACLI_TIMEOUT -> REBAR_JIRA_CLI_TIMEOUT (config reconciler.jira_cli_timeout); 'acli'=Atlassian CLI jargon.
  REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_RETRY_BUDGET (def 5) -> REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES (config reconciler.lock_max_retries); 'budget'->max_retries.
  RECONCILER_ABSENT_GET_BUDGET (def 20) -> REBAR_RECONCILER_DELETION_PROBE_LIMIT (config reconciler.deletion_probe_limit); opaque 'absent get budget' = GET probes to confirm a Jira issue is really deleted; + add missing REBAR_ prefix.
CLUSTER F (misc):
  WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE -> REMOVE (DSO vestige; DSO epic d7cf WU-1).
  REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL -> KEEP (test-tier billable-suite opt-in; test infra).
  TICKET_WORDLIST_PATH -> INTERNALIZE: engine_env pins it for subprocesses; self-resolve in the subprocess (same as REBAR_TICKET_CLI removal); not a user knob.
  SESSION_ID -> KEEP for now; follow-up ticket 83f2 (requires explicit user approval before change).
  SCRATCH_BASE_DIR -> RENAME REBAR_SCRATCH_BASE_DIR + config scratch.base_dir (LIVE per-ticket agent scratch feature, default .rebar/scratch; not DSO).
=== SWEEP COMPLETE: ~48 distinct vars reviewed across 6 clusters + core. ===
